title: Combat Engineer Battalion
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MilitaryUnit |image=[[File:CloneEngineers.jpg]] |name=Combat Engineer Battalion |type=[[Engineer/Legends|Engineering]]{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: The Saga Collection|pack=#068: Combat Engineer Clone Trooper|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TSC068engineer.asp}} |formation=[[Battalion/Legends|Battalion]] |commander=*[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] *[[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]{{TCWComicCite|6.18|Repel All Boarders!}} |second=[[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]] |staff=[[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Clone Sergeant]] [[Gaffa]] |subunit= |strength=[[Clone engineer]]s |vehicles= |headquarters= |location=[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] |battles=A [[Skirmish aboard the Twilight|skirmish]] aboard the [[Twilight/Legends|''Twilight'']] |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[38th Armored Division]] }} {{Quote|Patience truly is a ''virtue''... especially in the Engineer Battalion!|Clone Sergeant Gaffa|}} The '''Combat Engineer Battalion''', also called the '''Combat Engineers Battalion''' or just the '''Engineer Battalion''', was a [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] of [[clone engineer]]s of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]'s [[38th Armored Division]]. Serving under the commander of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda]], the [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] of the battalion were sent where needed to act as armored ground support for heavy [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] units such as [[Tank/Legends|tanks]] and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]]. A contingent of [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] from the Combat Engineer Battalion took part in a [[Skirmish aboard the Twilight|skirmish]] aboard the [[Twilight/Legends|''Twilight'']], during which they took parts from an inoperable [[A5-RX battle tank|battle tank]] and created a [[Missile/Legends|missile]] firing [[A5-RX Spread-Missile Battle Platform|battle platform]] to win the fight. ==Description== {{Quote|Never say never, Ahsoka — Especially where clone engineers are concerned.|Obi-Wan Kenobi on the Engineer Battalion|}} [[File:38thArmoredDivisionHeavyArtilleryCombatEngineer.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A combat engineer clone trooper.]] The Combat Engineer Battalion was a subdivision of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[38th Armored Division]]. Led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], the [[Clone engineer|clone combat engineers]] that made up the [[Battalion/Legends|battalion's]] forces were specially trained{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (toy line)|pack=Clone Troopers (Commemorative Episode III DVD Collection)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/rots05dvdsetColl3.asp}} to work with large war machines, such as the [[HAVw A6 Juggernaut/Legends|HAVw A6 Juggernaut]] [[Tank/Legends|tank]] and the [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery/Legends|Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery]] [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]], and as such were sent anywhere ground support was needed. The [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the Combat Engineer Battalion wore [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]] with fleurs-de-lis chest markings and [[Helmet/Legends|helmets]] painted with three wide stripes on the top. Two lines also extended from the fleurs-de-lis down to the upper [[Limb/Legends|legs]] where they stop. These markings were worn in either a brown or a dull yellow color. Some [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the Engineer Battalion only had markings on their helmets, where the brow and central fin were colored yellow. The clone [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] utilized [[F-187 fusioncutter]]s to make repairs and modifications to the equipment they worked on. ==History== {{Quote|I may have a ''solution'', General.''"
"''I have complete faith in your ''resolve'' Sergeant Gaffa, but... your ''tank'' isn't operational and your men are ''unarmed''.''"
"''Who needs a ''blaster'' when you've got an ''F-187 cutting tool''? Buy us some breathing space, sir, and we'll ''earn'' that faith!|Gaffa and Obi-Wan Kenobi|}} [[File:38thArmoredDivision-RepelAllBoarders.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Combat Engineers, including Sergeant Gaffa, at work.]] The clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] that made up the Combat Engineer Battalion were created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] by the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]] to serve the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The battalion of troopers were used by the Republic to combat the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} The battalion was placed under the command of Jedi Master Yoda and stationed on the planet{{DB|location|kashyyyk|Kashyyyk}} [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. By [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],{{TCWComicCite|6.18|Repel All Boarders!}} depicts [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]] as an active member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Since the ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' [[The Clone Wars: Season Five|season five]] episode "The Wrong Jedi" shows Tano leaving the Order, the events of the comic must take place no later than the when the episode takes place, which [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 42|''The Official Star Wars Fact File Part'' 42]] {{C|20 BBY 51-54: Jedi Temple bombing}} dates the events of to [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. members of the Engineer Battalion, along with an inoperable [[A5-RX battle tank|battle tank]] they planned to salvage, were present on the [[G9 Rigger-class light freighter/Legends|G9 Rigger freighter]] the ''[[Twilight/Legends|Twilight]]'' under the leadership of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]]. Part of a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], an engagement against Separatist [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] resulted in Republic forces retreating, which left the ''Twilight'' to be pursued by [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighters]]. The battle resulted in six of the battalion's engineers on life-support and four more with long-term injuries. With the damage the ''Twilight'' sustained shutting down the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and [[Engine/Legends|engines]], [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droids]] were able to board the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. During the ensuing [[Skirmish aboard the Twilight|skirmish]], [[Gaffa]], a [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Clone Sergeant]] of the Combat Engineer Battalion, devised a plan. While their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] fended off the onslaught of battle [[Droid/Legends|droids]], Gaffa and the rest of the able-bodied troops reconfigured parts of the inoperable tank into what Gaffa dubbed as the [[A5-RX Spread-Missile Battle Platform]]. The clones then proceeded to fire a volley of [[Missile/Legends|missiles]], blasting a hole into the side of the ''Twilight'', causing the droids to be jettisoned into [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. Through the hole they made, the clones then shot more missiles, destroying the vulture droids outside and allowing the ''Twilight'' to escape. At the war's [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|end]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], which includes the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. the clones of the Combat Engineer Battalion were issued [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which branded all Jedi as [[Treason/Legends|traitors]] to the Republic, by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]],{{Film|III}} to which the Engineer Battalion turned against their Jedi leaders. The actions of the battalion, along with the other clones of the Grand Army, ushered in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|First Galactic Empire]] with Palpatine as the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]]. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Clones_variations_concept_rots.png|thumb|right|250px|Concept art featuring the Engineer Battalion's design.]] First pictured in ''[[The Making of Star Wars Revenge of the Sith]]'', the armor design that would eventually become that of the Combat Engineer Battalion was created by [[Alex Jaeger]], originally meant to be a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commander]] variation for the film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].''[[The Making of Star Wars Revenge of the Sith]]'' Going unused in the film, the design was eventually repurposed for the Combat Engineer Battalion, being identified in [[Hasbro]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Saga Collection]]'' pack number sixty-eight labeled "Combat Engineer Clone Trooper." The pack was released in [[2007]],''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Action Figure Collection]]'' and gave the name "Combat Engineer Battalion." Released in [[May 20]], [[2008]],{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/totg1|text=''Threats of the Galaxy'' Preview 1}} the [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'' gave the slightly different name of the "Combat Engineers Battalion," where the only difference is the pluralization of the word engineer.''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'' The battalion would finally makes its appearance in the "[[Repel All Boarders!]]" comic that featured in the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.18|eighteenth issue of the sixth volume]] of the [[Star Wars Comic|''Star Wars'' Comic]] magazines. Released on [[March 10]], [[2011]],{{SWArchive|url=vault/books/whatsnewmar14/index.html|text=What's New This Week: ''Insider'' #124, ''Clone Wars Comic'' #6.18, & ''Galaxy'' #6}} the comic was written by [[Robin Etherington]] and the Engineer Battalion's depiction was created by artist [[Andres Ponce]]. The comic also gave the unit the shortened name of "Engineer Battalion." ==Appearances== *{{TCWComicCite|6.18|Repel All Boarders!}} {{1st}} {{1stID|Engineer Battalion}} ==Sources== *''[[The Making of Star Wars Revenge of the Sith]]'' {{1stp}} *{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (toy line)|pack=Clone Troopers (Commemorative Episode III DVD Collection)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/rots05dvdsetColl3.asp}} *{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: The Saga Collection|pack=#068: Combat Engineer Clone Trooper|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TSC068engineer.asp}} {{1stID|Combat Engineer Battalion}} *''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'' {{1stID|Combat Engineers Battalion}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Action Figure Collection]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Technik-Bataillon |es=Batallón de Ingenieros de Combate |tr=Muharebe Mühendis Taburu |deGA=1 }} [[Category:Grand Army of the Republic battalions]] [[Category:Members of the 38th Armored Division]]
